role: This directory contains GitHub issue templates for the ArchSpine project, providing structured forms for bug reports, feature requests, documentation improvements, and issue template configuration.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates standardize and streamline user contributions by guiding contributors through reproducible bug reports, detailed feature suggestions, documentation enhancement requests, and controlling blank issue submissions and community discussion links for the ArchSpine project.

children.role: This document configures the GitHub issue template settings for the ArchSpine project, specifically controlling blank issues and directing users to a community discussion board.
Template for suggesting documentation improvements to the ArchSpine project.
GitHub issue template for collecting feature requests and enhancement ideas for the ArchSpine project.
